telltalePatterns: spirantization of voiced stops between vowels

prosody.intonation: flat pitch contours with L1-transferred rising terminals on declaratives
prosody.fluencyNotes: Syllable-timed rhythm causes lack of weak forms. Minimal consonant-to-vowel linking across word boundaries.

strengths: Accurate production of glottal fricative /h/ in high and house avoiding velar fricative substitution
Clear vowel length distinctions in stressed syllables

recommendedFocus.reason: Critical for distinguishing high-frequency minimal pairs which significantly impacts intelligibility.
Substitution with bilabial /b/ or /β/ is a salient non-native marker that can cause lexical confusion.

result.transcript: Yesterday, the weather was really beautiful, so I decided to go for a walk through the park near my house. The trees were green, and the birds were singing everywhere. I think spring is my favorite time of the year. I walked along the river and watched some children playing with a big red ball. They were laughing and having so much fun together. One little girl threw the ball very high, and it landed right in the water. Her father had to reach in and pull it out. After that, I stopped at a small village shop to buy some bread and a bottle of juice.
